'''yatuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wulst|wulst]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-t-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wulst|wulst]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yatuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yætithith|yætithith]] || [[word:yætithij|yætithij]] || [[word:yætithish|yætithish]] || [[word:yætithi|yætithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yatututhuth|yatututhuth]] || [[word:yatututhuj|yatututhuj]] || [[word:yatututhush|yatututhush]] || [[word:yatututhu|yatututhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yatuthuth|yatuthuth]] || [[word:yatuthuj|yatuthuj]] || [[word:yatuthush|yatuthush]] || [[word:yatuthu|yatuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yatufthuth|yatufthuth]] || [[word:yatufthuj|yatufthuj]] || [[word:yatufthush|yatufthush]] || [[word:yatufthuf|yatufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yatuthuthu|yatuthuthu]] || [[word:yatuthuju|yatuthuju]] || [[word:yatuthushu|yatuthushu]] || [[word:yatuthuku|yatuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yatuthuth|yatuthuth]] || [[word:yatuthuj|yatuthuj]] || [[word:yatuthush|yatuthush]] || [[word:yatuthu|yatuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yatuthuthul|yatuthuthul]] || [[word:yatuthujul|yatuthujul]] || [[word:yatuthushul|yatuthushul]] || [[word:yatuthukul|yatuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yatuthuthuthu|yatuthuthuthu]] || [[word:yatuthujuju|yatuthujuju]] || [[word:yatuthushushu|yatuthushushu]] || [[word:yatuthuku|yatuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yatuthuthun|yatuthuthun]] || [[word:yatuthujun|yatuthujun]] || [[word:yatuthushun|yatuthushun]] || [[word:yatuthukun|yatuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yatuthuthuoro|yatuthuthuoro]] || [[word:yatuthujuoro|yatuthujuoro]] || [[word:yatuthushuoro|yatuthushuoro]] || [[word:yatuthukuoro|yatuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
